ModMetaData.name: Medieval Overhaul - Advanced Mining
ModMetaData.author: wishRobber
ModMetaData.description: Integrate Mines 2.0 into your Medieval Overhaul mine shaft. This ties Mines 2.0's deep-mining recipes and research to Medieval Overhaul's mine shaft (renamed "Advanced Mining") and hides the redundant Mines 2.0 building, for one clean medieval mining system.
